Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(** Construction of actegory morphisms

Part Generalization of pointed distributivity laws (a misnomer as it became clear in July 2023) to relative lax commutators in general monoidal categories
- definition
- construction of actegory morphism from it
- composition

Part Closure of the notion of actegory morphisms under
- the pointwise binary product of functors
- the pointwise binary coproduct of functors


author: Ralph Matthes 2022
 *)

Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.NaturalTransformations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.PrecategoryBinProduct.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.whiskering.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.WhiskeredBifunctors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Actegories.Actegories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Actegories.MorphismsOfActegories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Actegories.ConstructionOfActegories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.coslicecat.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Examples.MonoidalPointedObjects.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.BinProducts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.BinCoproducts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Coproducts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Actegories.CoproductsInActegories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Actegories.ProductsInActegories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Actegories.ProductActegory.

Local Open Scope cat.

Import BifunctorNotations.
Import MonoidalNotations.
Import ActegoryNotations.

Section ReindexedLineatorAndRelativeLaxCommutator.

  Context {V : category} (Mon_V : monoidal V)
          {W : category} (Mon_W : monoidal W)
          {F : W ⟶ V} (U : fmonoidal Mon_W Mon_V F).


Section ReindexedLaxLineator.

  Context {C D : category} (ActC : actegory Mon_V C) (ActD : actegory Mon_V D).

Section OnFunctors.

  Context {H : functor C D} (ll : lineator_lax Mon_V ActC ActD H).

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
W: category
Mon_W: monoidal W
F: W ⟶ V
U: fmonoidal Mon_W Mon_V F
C, D: category
ActC: actegory Mon_V C
ActD: actegory Mon_V D
H: C ⟶ D
ll: lineator_lax Mon_V ActC ActD H
lineator_data Mon_W
  (reindexed_actegory Mon_V ActC Mon_W U)
  (reindexed_actegory Mon_V ActD Mon_W U) H

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
W: category
Mon_W: monoidal W
F: W ⟶ V
U: fmonoidal Mon_W Mon_V F
C, D: category
ActC: actegory Mon_V C
ActD: actegory Mon_V D
H: C ⟶ D
ll: lineator_lax Mon_V ActC ActD H
lineator_data Mon_W
  (reindexed_actegory Mon_V ActC Mon_W U)
  (reindexed_actegory Mon_V ActD Mon_W U) H

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
W: category
Mon_W: monoidal W
F: W ⟶ V
U: fmonoidal Mon_W Mon_V F
C, D: category
ActC: actegory Mon_V C
ActD: actegory Mon_V D
H: C ⟶ D
ll: lineator_lax Mon_V ActC ActD H
w: W
c: C
D ⟦ w ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V ActD Mon_W U} H c,
H (w ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V ActC Mon_W U} c) ⟧
 exact (ll (F w) c).
  Defined.

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
W: category
Mon_W: monoidal W
F: W ⟶ V
U: fmonoidal Mon_W Mon_V F
C, D: category
ActC: actegory Mon_V C
ActD: actegory Mon_V D
H: C ⟶ D
ll: lineator_lax Mon_V ActC ActD H
lineator_laxlaws Mon_W
  (reindexed_actegory Mon_V ActC Mon_W U)
  (reindexed_actegory Mon_V ActD Mon_W U) H
  reindexed_lax_lineator_data

V: category

lineator_nat_left Mon_W

V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
W: category
Mon_W: monoidal W
F: W ⟶ V
U: fmonoidal Mon_W Mon_V F
C, D: category
ActC: actegory Mon_V C
ActD: actegory Mon_V D
H: C ⟶ D
ll: lineator_lax Mon_V ActC ActD H
v: W
x1, x2: C
g: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
v ⊗^{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V ActD Mon_W U}_{l} # H g
· reindexed_lax_lineator_data v x2 =
reindexed_lax_lineator_data v x1
· # H
    (v
     ⊗^{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V ActC Mon_W U}_{l} g)
 apply (lineator_linnatleft _ _ _ _ ll).
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
W: category
Mon_W: monoidal W
F: W ⟶ V
U: fmonoidal Mon_W Mon_V F
C, D: category
ActC: actegory Mon_V C
ActD: actegory Mon_V D
H: C ⟶ D
ll: lineator_lax Mon_V ActC ActD H
lineator_nat_right Mon_W
  (reindexed_actegory Mon_V ActC Mon_W U)
  (reindexed_actegory Mon_V ActD Mon_W U) H
  reindexed_lax_lineator_data
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
W: category
Mon_W: monoidal W
F: W ⟶ V
U: fmonoidal Mon_W Mon_V F
C, D: category
ActC: actegory Mon_V C
ActD: actegory Mon_V D
H: C ⟶ D
ll: lineator_lax Mon_V ActC ActD H
v1, v2: W
x: C
f: W ⟦ v1, v2 ⟧
f ⊗^{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V ActD Mon_W U}_{r} H x
· reindexed_lax_lineator_data v2 x =
reindexed_lax_lineator_data v1 x
· # H
    (f
     ⊗^{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V ActC Mon_W U}_{r} x)
 apply (lineator_linnatright _ _ _ _ ll).
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
W: category
Mon_W: monoidal W
F: W ⟶ V
U: fmonoidal Mon_W Mon_V F
C, D: category
ActC: actegory Mon_V C
ActD: actegory Mon_V D
H: C ⟶ D
ll: lineator_lax Mon_V ActC ActD H
preserves_actor Mon_W
  (reindexed_actegory Mon_V ActC Mon_W U)
  (reindexed_actegory Mon_V ActD Mon_W U) H
  reindexed_lax_lineator_data
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
W: category
Mon_W: monoidal W
F: W ⟶ V
U: fmonoidal Mon_W Mon_V F
C, D: category
ActC: actegory Mon_V C
ActD: actegory Mon_V D
H: C ⟶ D
ll: lineator_lax Mon_V ActC ActD H
v, w: W
x: C
reindexed_lax_lineator_data (v ⊗_{ Mon_W} w) x
· # H
    aα^{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V ActC Mon_W U }_{ v,
    w, x} =
aα^{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V ActD Mon_W U }_{ v, w,
H x}
· v
  ⊗^{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V ActD Mon_W U}_{l} reindexed_lax_lineator_data
                                                 w x
· reindexed_lax_lineator_data v
    (w ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V ActC Mon_W U} x)
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
W: category
Mon_W: monoidal W
F: W ⟶ V
U: fmonoidal Mon_W Mon_V F
C, D: category
ActC: actegory Mon_V C
ActD: actegory Mon_V D
H: C ⟶ D
ll: lineator_lax Mon_V ActC ActD H
v, w: W
x: C
reindexed_lax_lineator_data (v ⊗_{ Mon_W} w) x
· # H (reindexed_actor_data Mon_V ActC Mon_W U v w x) =
reindexed_actor_data Mon_V ActD Mon_W U v w (H x)
· F v ⊗^{ ActD}_{l} reindexed_lax_lineator_data w x
· reindexed_lax_lineator_data v (F w ⊗_{ ActC} x)
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
W: category
Mon_W: monoidal W
F: W ⟶ V
U: fmonoidal Mon_W Mon_V F
C, D: category
ActC: actegory Mon_V C
ActD: actegory Mon_V D
H: C ⟶ D
ll: lineator_lax Mon_V ActC ActD H
v, w: W
x: C
ll (F (v ⊗_{ Mon_W} w)) x
· # H
    (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly U v w)
     ⊗^{ ActC}_{r} x · aα^{ ActC }_{ F v, F w, x}) =
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly U v w)
⊗^{ ActD}_{r} H x · aα^{ ActD }_{ F v, F w, H x}
· F v ⊗^{ ActD}_{l} ll (F w) x
· ll (F v) (F w ⊗_{ ActC} x)

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
W: category
Mon_W: monoidal W
F: W ⟶ V
U: fmonoidal Mon_W Mon_V F
C, D: category
ActC: actegory Mon_V C
ActD: actegory Mon_V D
H: C ⟶ D
ll: lineator_lax Mon_V ActC ActD H
v, w: W
x: C
ll (F (v ⊗_{ Mon_W} w)) x
· # H
    (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly U v w)
     ⊗^{ ActC}_{r} x · aα^{ ActC }_{ F v, F w, x}) =
?b
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
W: category
Mon_W: monoidal W
F: W ⟶ V
U: fmonoidal Mon_W Mon_V F
C, D: category
ActC: actegory Mon_V C
ActD: actegory Mon_V D
H: C ⟶ D
ll: lineator_lax Mon_V ActC ActD H
v, w: W
x: C
?b =
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly U v w)
⊗^{ ActD}_{r} H x · aα^{ ActD }_{ F v, F w, H x}
· F v ⊗^{ ActD}_{l} ll (F w) x
· ll (F v) (F w ⊗_{ ActC} x)

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
W: category

F: W ⟶ V
U: fmonoidal Mon_W Mon_V F
C, D: category
ActC: actegory Mon_V C
ActD: actegory Mon_V D
H: C ⟶ D
ll: lineator_lax Mon_V ActC ActD H
v, w: W
x: C
?b =
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly U v w)
⊗^{ ActD}_{r} H x · aα^{ ActD }_{ F v, F w, H x}
· F v ⊗^{ ActD}_{l} ll (F w) x
· ll (F v) (F w ⊗_{ ActC} x)
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
W: category
Mon_W: monoidal W
F: W ⟶ V
U: fmonoidal Mon_W Mon_V F
C, D: category
ActC: actegory Mon_V C
ActD: actegory Mon_V D
H: C ⟶ D
ll: lineator_lax Mon_V ActC ActD H
v, w: W
x: C
?b =
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly U v w)
⊗^{ ActD}_{r} H x
· (aα^{ ActD }_{ F v, F w, H x}
   · (F v ⊗^{ ActD}_{l} ll (F w) x
      · ll (F v) (F w ⊗_{ ActC} x)))
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
W: category
Mon_W: monoidal W
F: W ⟶ V
U: fmonoidal Mon_W Mon_V F
C, D: category
ActC: actegory Mon_V C
ActD: actegory Mon_V D
H: C ⟶ D
ll: lineator_lax Mon_V ActC ActD H
v, w: W
x: C
?t1 =
aα^{ ActD }_{ F v, F w, H x}
· (F v ⊗^{ ActD}_{l} ll (F w) x
   · ll (F v) (F w ⊗_{ ActC} x))

           
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
W: category
Mon_W: monoidal W
F: W ⟶ V
U: fmonoidal Mon_W Mon_V F
C, D: category
ActC: actegory Mon_V C
ActD: actegory Mon_V D
H: C ⟶ D
ll: lineator_lax Mon_V ActC ActD H
v, w: W
x: C
?t1 =
aα^{ ActD }_{ F v, F w, H x}
· F v ⊗^{ ActD}_{l} ll (F w) x
· ll (F v) (F w ⊗_{ ActC} x)

           apply (lineator_preservesactor _ _ _ _ ll). 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
W: category
Mon_W: monoidal W
F: W ⟶ V
U: fmonoidal Mon_W Mon_V F
C, D: category
ActC: actegory Mon_V C
ActD: actegory Mon_V D
H: C ⟶ D
ll: lineator_lax Mon_V ActC ActD H
v, w: W
x: C
ll (F (v ⊗_{ Mon_W} w)) x
· # H
    (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly U v w)
     ⊗^{ ActC}_{r} x · aα^{ ActC }_{ F v, F w, x}) =
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly U v w)
⊗^{ ActD}_{r} H x
· (ll (F v ⊗_{ Mon_V} F w) x
   · # H aα^{ ActC }_{ F v, F w, x})

V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
W: category
Mon_W: monoidal W
F: W ⟶ V
U: fmonoidal Mon_W Mon_V F
C, D: category
ActC: actegory Mon_V C
ActD: actegory Mon_V D
H: C ⟶ D
ll: lineator_lax Mon_V ActC ActD H
v, w: W
x: C
ll (F (v ⊗_{ Mon_W} w)) x
· # H
    (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly U v w)
     ⊗^{ ActC}_{r} x · aα^{ ActC }_{ F v, F w, x}) =
ll (F (v ⊗_{ Mon_W} w)) x
· # H
    (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly U v w)
     ⊗^{ ActC}_{r} x · aα^{ ActC }_{ F v, F w, x})

      apply idpath.
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
W: category
Mon_W: monoidal W
F: W ⟶ V
U: fmonoidal Mon_W Mon_V F
C, D: category
ActC: actegory Mon_V C
ActD: actegory Mon_V D
H: C ⟶ D
ll: lineator_lax Mon_V ActC ActD H
preserves_unitor Mon_W
  (reindexed_actegory Mon_V ActC Mon_W U)
  (reindexed_actegory Mon_V ActD Mon_W U) H
  reindexed_lax_lineator_data
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
W: category
Mon_W: monoidal W
F: W ⟶ V
U: fmonoidal Mon_W Mon_V F
C, D: category
ActC: actegory Mon_V C
ActD: actegory Mon_V D
H: C ⟶ D
ll: lineator_lax Mon_V ActC ActD H
x: C
reindexed_lax_lineator_data I_{ Mon_W} x
· # H
    au^{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V ActC Mon_W U }_{ x} =
au^{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V ActD Mon_W U }_{ H x}
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
W: category
Mon_W: monoidal W
F: W ⟶ V
U: fmonoidal Mon_W Mon_V F
C, D: category
ActC: actegory Mon_V C
ActD: actegory Mon_V D
H: C ⟶ D
ll: lineator_lax Mon_V ActC ActD H
x: C
reindexed_lax_lineator_data I_{ Mon_W} x
· # H
    (reindexed_action_unitor_data Mon_V ActC Mon_W U x) =
reindexed_action_unitor_data Mon_V ActD Mon_W U (H x)

· # H
    (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly U)
     ⊗^{ ActC}_{r} x · au^{ ActC }_{ x}) =
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly U)
⊗^{ ActD}_{r} H x · au^{ ActD }_{ H x}

  Definition reindexed_lax_lineator : lineator_lax Mon_W (reindexed_actegory Mon_V ActC Mon_W U)
                                                      (reindexed_actegory Mon_V ActD Mon_W U) H :=
    _,,reindexed_lax_lineator_laws.

End OnFunctors.

Section OnNaturalTransformations.

  Context {H : functor C D} (Hl : lineator_lax Mon_V ActC ActD H)
    {K : functor C D} (Kl : lineator_lax Mon_V ActC ActD K)
    {ξ : H ⟹ K} (islntξ : is_linear_nat_trans Hl Kl ξ).

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
W: category
Mon_W: monoidal W
F: W ⟶ V
U: fmonoidal Mon_W Mon_V F
C, D: category
ActC: actegory Mon_V C
ActD: actegory Mon_V D
H: C ⟶ D
Hl: lineator_lax Mon_V ActC ActD H
K: C ⟶ D
Kl: lineator_lax Mon_V ActC ActD K
ξ: H ⟹ K
islntξ: is_linear_nat_trans Hl Kl ξ
is_linear_nat_trans (reindexed_lax_lineator Hl)
  (reindexed_lax_lineator Kl) ξ

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
W: category
Mon_W: monoidal W
F: W ⟶ V
U: fmonoidal Mon_W Mon_V F
C, D: category
ActC: actegory Mon_V C
ActD: actegory Mon_V D
H: C ⟶ D
Hl: lineator_lax Mon_V ActC ActD H
K: C ⟶ D
Kl: lineator_lax Mon_V ActC ActD K
ξ: H ⟹ K
islntξ: is_linear_nat_trans Hl Kl ξ
is_linear_nat_trans (reindexed_lax_lineator Hl)
  (reindexed_lax_lineator Kl) ξ

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
W: category
Mon_W: monoidal W
F: W ⟶ V
U: fmonoidal Mon_W Mon_V F
C, D: category
ActC: actegory Mon_V C
ActD: actegory Mon_V D
H: C ⟶ D
Hl: lineator_lax Mon_V ActC ActD H
K: C ⟶ D
Kl: lineator_lax Mon_V ActC ActD K
ξ: H ⟹ K
islntξ: is_linear_nat_trans Hl Kl ξ
w: W
c: C
reindexed_lax_lineator Hl w c
· ξ (w ⊗_{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V ActC Mon_W U} c) =
w ⊗^{ reindexed_actegory Mon_V ActD Mon_W U}_{l} ξ c
· reindexed_lax_lineator Kl w c

    apply islntξ.
  Qed.

End OnNaturalTransformations.

End ReindexedLaxLineator.

Section RelativeLaxCommutator.

Section FixAnObject.

  Context {v0 : V}.

  Definition relativelaxcommutator_data: UU := ∏ (w: W), F w ⊗_{Mon_V} v0 --> v0 ⊗_{Mon_V} F w.

  Identity Coercion relativelaxcommutator_data_funclass: relativelaxcommutator_data >-> Funclass.

Section γ_laws.

  Context (γ : relativelaxcommutator_data).

  Definition relativelaxcommutator_nat: UU := is_nat_trans (functor_composite F (rightwhiskering_functor Mon_V v0))
                                                           (functor_composite F (leftwhiskering_functor Mon_V v0)) γ.

  Definition relativelaxcommutator_tensor_body (w w' : W): UU :=
    γ (w ⊗_{Mon_W} w') = pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly U w w') ⊗^{Mon_V}_{r} v0 · α_{Mon_V} _ _ _ ·
                           F w ⊗^{Mon_V}_{l} γ w' · αinv_{Mon_V} _ _ _ · γ w ⊗^{Mon_V}_{r} F w' ·
                           α_{Mon_V} _ _ _ · v0 ⊗^{Mon_V}_{l} fmonoidal_preservestensordata U w w'.

  Definition relativelaxcommutator_tensor: UU := ∏ (w w' : W), relativelaxcommutator_tensor_body w w'.

  Definition relativelaxcommutator_unit: UU :=
    γ I_{Mon_W} = pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly U) ⊗^{Mon_V}_{r} v0 · lu_{Mon_V} v0 ·
                  ruinv_{Mon_V} v0 · v0 ⊗^{Mon_V}_{l} fmonoidal_preservesunit U.


End γ_laws.

Definition relativelaxcommutator: UU := ∑ γ : relativelaxcommutator_data,
      relativelaxcommutator_nat γ × relativelaxcommutator_tensor γ × relativelaxcommutator_unit γ.

Definition relativelaxcommutator_lddata (γ : relativelaxcommutator): relativelaxcommutator_data := pr1 γ.
Coercion relativelaxcommutator_lddata : relativelaxcommutator >-> relativelaxcommutator_data.

Definition relativelaxcommutator_ldnat (γ : relativelaxcommutator): relativelaxcommutator_nat γ := pr12 γ.
Definition relativelaxcommutator_ldtensor (γ : relativelaxcommutator): relativelaxcommutator_tensor γ := pr122 γ.
Definition relativelaxcommutator_ldunit (γ : relativelaxcommutator): relativelaxcommutator_unit γ := pr222 γ.



Section ActegoryMorphismFromRelativeLaxCommutator.

  Context (γ : relativelaxcommutator) {C : category} (ActV : actegory Mon_V C).

  Local Definition FF: C ⟶ C := leftwhiskering_functor ActV v0.
  Local Definition ActW: actegory Mon_W C := reindexed_actegory Mon_V ActV Mon_W U.

lineator_data Mon_W ActW ActW FF

  lineator_data_from_commutator
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V

lineator_laxlaws Mon_W ActW ActW FF
  lineator_data_from_commutator

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V

# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v0 · γ x' =
γ x · v0 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
v: W
x1, x2: C
g: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
F v ⊗^{ ActV}_{l} (v0 ⊗^{ ActV}_{l} g)
· (aαinv^{ ActV }_{ F v, v0, x2}
   · γ v ⊗^{ ActV}_{r} x2 · aα^{ ActV }_{ v0, F v, x2}) =
aαinv^{ ActV }_{ F v, v0, x1} · γ v ⊗^{ ActV}_{r} x1
· aα^{ ActV }_{ v0, F v, x1}
· v0 ⊗^{ ActV}_{l} (F v ⊗^{ ActV}_{l} g)
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
W: category
Mon_W: monoidal W
F: W ⟶ V
U: fmonoidal Mon_W Mon_V F
v0: V
γ: relativelaxcommutator
C: category
ActV: actegory Mon_V C
γ_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v0 · γ x' =
γ x · v0 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
v1, v2: W
x: C
f: W ⟦ v1, v2 ⟧
# F f ⊗^{ ActV}_{r} (v0 ⊗_{ ActV} x)
· (aαinv^{ ActV }_{ F v2, v0, x}
   · γ v2 ⊗^{ ActV}_{r} x · 
   aα^{ ActV }_{ v0, F v2, x}) =
aαinv^{ ActV }_{ F v1, v0, x} · γ v1 ⊗^{ ActV}_{r} x
· aα^{ ActV }_{ v0, F v1, x}
· v0 ⊗^{ ActV}_{l} (# F f ⊗^{ ActV}_{r} x)
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
W: category
Mon_W: monoidal W
F: W ⟶ V
U: fmonoidal Mon_W Mon_V F
v0: V
γ: relativelaxcommutator
C: category
ActV: actegory Mon_V C
γ_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v0 · γ x' =
γ x · v0 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
v, w: W
x: C
aαinv^{ ActV }_{ F (v ⊗_{ Mon_W} w), v0, x}
· γ (v ⊗_{ Mon_W} w) ⊗^{ ActV}_{r} x
· aα^{ ActV }_{ v0, F (v ⊗_{ Mon_W} w), x}
· v0
  ⊗^{ ActV}_{l} (pr1
                   (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                      U v w) ⊗^{ ActV}_{r} x
                 · aα^{ ActV }_{ F v, F w, x}) =
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly U v w)
⊗^{ ActV}_{r} (v0 ⊗_{ ActV} x)
· aα^{ ActV }_{ F v, F w, v0 ⊗_{ ActV} x}
· F v
  ⊗^{ ActV}_{l} (aαinv^{ ActV }_{ F w, v0, x}
                 · γ w ⊗^{ ActV}_{r} x
                 · aα^{ ActV }_{ v0, F w, x})
· (aαinv^{ ActV }_{ F v, v0, F w ⊗_{ ActV} x}
   · γ v ⊗^{ ActV}_{r} (F w ⊗_{ ActV} x)
   · aα^{ ActV }_{ v0, F v, F w ⊗_{ ActV} x})
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
W: category
Mon_W: monoidal W
F: W ⟶ V
U: fmonoidal Mon_W Mon_V F
v0: V
γ: relativelaxcommutator
C: category
ActV: actegory Mon_V C
γ_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v0 · γ x' =
γ x · v0 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
x: C
aαinv^{ ActV }_{ F I_{ Mon_W}, v0, x}
· γ I_{ Mon_W} ⊗^{ ActV}_{r} x
· aα^{ ActV }_{ v0, F I_{ Mon_W}, x}
· v0
  ⊗^{ ActV}_{l} (pr1
                   (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly U)
                 ⊗^{ ActV}_{r} x · 
                 au^{ ActV }_{ x}) =
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly U)
⊗^{ ActV}_{r} (v0 ⊗_{ ActV} x)
· au^{ ActV }_{ v0 ⊗_{ ActV} x}

    
V: category

γ_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),

γ x · v0 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
v: W
x1, x2: C
g: C ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧
F v ⊗^{ ActV}_{l} (v0 ⊗^{ ActV}_{l} g)
· (aαinv^{ ActV }_{ F v, v0, x2}
   · γ v ⊗^{ ActV}_{r} x2 · aα^{ ActV }_{ v0, F v, x2}) =
aαinv^{ ActV }_{ F v, v0, x1} · γ v ⊗^{ ActV}_{r} x1
· aα^{ ActV }_{ v0, F v, x1}
· v0 ⊗^{ ActV}_{l} (F v ⊗^{ ActV}_{l} g)

γ_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v0 · γ x' =
γ x · v0 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
v1, v2: W
x: C
f: W ⟦ v1, v2 ⟧
?b =
aαinv^{ ActV }_{ F v1, v0, x} · γ v1 ⊗^{ ActV}_{r} x
· aα^{ ActV }_{ v0, F v1, x}
· v0 ⊗^{ ActV}_{l} (# F f ⊗^{ ActV}_{r} x)

C: category
ActV: actegory Mon_V C
γ_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v0 · γ x' =
γ x · v0 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
v1, v2: W
x: C
f: W ⟦ v1, v2 ⟧
?b =
aαinv^{ ActV }_{ F v1, v0, x}
· (γ v1 ⊗^{ ActV}_{r} x
   · (aα^{ ActV }_{ v0, F v1, x}
      · v0 ⊗^{ ActV}_{l} (# F f ⊗^{ ActV}_{r} x)))

γ_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v0 · γ x' =
γ x · v0 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
v1, v2: W
x: C
f: W ⟦ v1, v2 ⟧
?t1 =
aα^{ ActV }_{ v0, F v1, x}
· v0 ⊗^{ ActV}_{l} (# F f ⊗^{ ActV}_{r} x)

           apply pathsinv0, actegory_actornatleftright.
      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
W: category
Mon_W: monoidal W
F: W ⟶ V
U: fmonoidal Mon_W Mon_V F
v0: V
γ: relativelaxcommutator
C: category
ActV: actegory Mon_V C
γ_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v0 · γ x' =
γ x · v0 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
v1, v2: W
x: C
f: W ⟦ v1, v2 ⟧
aαinv^{ ActV }_{ F v1, v0, x}
· (# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v0) ⊗^{ ActV}_{r} x
· γ v2 ⊗^{ ActV}_{r} x · aα^{ ActV }_{ v0, F v2, x} =
aαinv^{ ActV }_{ F v1, v0, x}
· (γ v1 ⊗^{ ActV}_{r} x
   · ((v0 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f) ⊗^{ ActV}_{r} x
      · aα^{ ActV }_{ v0, F v2, x}))

      
V: category

γ_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),

γ x · v0 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
v1, v2: W
x: C
f: W ⟦ v1, v2 ⟧
aαinv^{ ActV }_{ F v1, v0, x}
· ((# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v0) ⊗^{ ActV}_{r} x
   · (γ v2 ⊗^{ ActV}_{r} x
      · aα^{ ActV }_{ v0, F v2, x})) =
aαinv^{ ActV }_{ F v1, v0, x}
· (γ v1 ⊗^{ ActV}_{r} x
   · ((v0 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f) ⊗^{ ActV}_{r} x
      · aα^{ ActV }_{ v0, F v2, x}))

V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
W: category
Mon_W: monoidal W
F: W ⟶ V
U: fmonoidal Mon_W Mon_V F
v0: V
γ: relativelaxcommutator
C: category
ActV: actegory Mon_V C
γ_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v0 · γ x' =
γ x · v0 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
v, w: W
x: C
aαinv^{ ActV }_{ F (v ⊗_{ Mon_W} w), v0, x}
· γ (v ⊗_{ Mon_W} w) ⊗^{ ActV}_{r} x
· aα^{ ActV }_{ v0, F (v ⊗_{ Mon_W} w), x}
· v0
  ⊗^{ ActV}_{l} (pr1
                   (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                      U v w) ⊗^{ ActV}_{r} x
                 · aα^{ ActV }_{ F v, F w, x}) =
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly U v w)
⊗^{ ActV}_{r} (v0 ⊗_{ ActV} x)
· aα^{ ActV }_{ F v, F w, v0 ⊗_{ ActV} x}
· F v
  ⊗^{ ActV}_{l} (aαinv^{ ActV }_{ F w, v0, x}
                 · γ w ⊗^{ ActV}_{r} x
                 · aα^{ ActV }_{ v0, F w, x})
· (aαinv^{ ActV }_{ F v, v0, F w ⊗_{ ActV} x}
   · γ v ⊗^{ ActV}_{r} (F w ⊗_{ ActV} x)
   · aα^{ ActV }_{ v0, F v, F w ⊗_{ ActV} x})

· γ (v ⊗_{ Mon_W} w) ⊗^{ ActV}_{r} x

· v0
  ⊗^{ ActV}_{l} (pr1
                   (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                      U v w) ⊗^{ ActV}_{r} x
                 · aα^{ ActV }_{ F v, F w, x}) = ?b

v0

V: category

γ x · v0 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
v, w: W
x: C
aαinv^{ ActV }_{ F (v ⊗_{ Mon_W} w), v0, x}
· γ (v ⊗_{ Mon_W} w) ⊗^{ ActV}_{r} x
· aα^{ ActV }_{ v0, F (v ⊗_{ Mon_W} w), x}
· (# (leftwhiskering_functor ActV v0)
     (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly U v w)
      ⊗^{ ActV}_{r} x)
   · # (leftwhiskering_functor ActV v0)
       aα^{ ActV }_{ F v, F w, x}) =

⊗^{ ActV}_{r} (v0 ⊗_{ ActV} x)
· aα^{ ActV }_{ F v, F w, v0 ⊗_{ ActV} x}
· F v
  ⊗^{ ActV}_{l} (aαinv^{ ActV }_{ F w, v0, x}
                 · γ w ⊗^{ ActV}_{r} x
                 · aα^{ ActV }_{ v0, F w, x})
· (aαinv^{ ActV }_{ F v, v0, F w ⊗_{ ActV} x}
   · γ v ⊗^{ ActV}_{r} (F w ⊗_{ ActV} x)
   · aα^{ ActV }_{ v0, F v, F w ⊗_{ ActV} x})

· (aαinv^{ ActV }_{ F v, v0, F w ⊗_{ ActV} x}
   · γ v ⊗^{ ActV}_{r} (F w ⊗_{ ActV} x)

v0: V

γ_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),

γ x · v0 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f

?b =

⊗^{ ActV}_{r} (v0 ⊗_{ ActV} x)
· aα^{ ActV }_{ F v, F w, v0 ⊗_{ ActV} x}
· F v
  ⊗^{ ActV}_{l} (aαinv^{ ActV }_{ F w, v0, x}
                 · γ w ⊗^{ ActV}_{r} x
                 · aα^{ ActV }_{ v0, F w, x})
· (aαinv^{ ActV }_{ F v, v0, F w ⊗_{ ActV} x}
   · γ v ⊗^{ ActV}_{r} (F w ⊗_{ ActV} x)
   · aα^{ ActV }_{ v0, F v, F w ⊗_{ ActV} x})

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
W: category
Mon_W: monoidal W
F: W ⟶ V
U: fmonoidal Mon_W Mon_V F
v0: V
γ: relativelaxcommutator
C: category
ActV: actegory Mon_V C
γ_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v0 · γ x' =
γ x · v0 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
v, w: W
x: C
aαinv^{ ActV }_{ F (v ⊗_{ Mon_W} w), v0, x}
· γ (v ⊗_{ Mon_W} w) ⊗^{ ActV}_{r} x
· aα^{ ActV }_{ v0, F (v ⊗_{ Mon_W} w), x}
· (v0
   ⊗^{ ActV}_{l} (pr1
                    (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                       U v w) ⊗^{ ActV}_{r} x)
   · v0 ⊗^{ ActV}_{l} aα^{ ActV }_{ F v, F w, x}) = 
?b

# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v0 · γ x' =
γ x · v0 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
v, w: W
x: C
v0 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} fmonoidal_preservestensordata U v w
· v0
  ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} pr1
                   (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                      U v w) = ?b

γ x · v0 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
v, w: W
x: C
?b = ?t2

V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
W: category
Mon_W: monoidal W
F: W ⟶ V
U: fmonoidal Mon_W Mon_V F
v0: V
γ: relativelaxcommutator
C: category
ActV: actegory Mon_V C
γ_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v0 · γ x' =
γ x · v0 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
v, w: W
x: C
fmonoidal_preservestensordata U v w
· pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly U v w) =
identity (F v ⊗_{ Mon_V} F w)

        apply (pr2 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly U v w)).
      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
W: category
Mon_W: monoidal W
F: W ⟶ V
U: fmonoidal Mon_W Mon_V F
v0: V
γ: relativelaxcommutator
C: category
ActV: actegory Mon_V C
γ_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v0 · γ x' =
γ x · v0 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
v, w: W
x: C
aαinv^{ ActV }_{ F (v ⊗_{ Mon_W} w), v0, x}
· (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly U v w)
   ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v0
   · (α^{ Mon_V }_{ F v, F w, v0}
      · (F v ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} γ w
         · (αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ F v, v0, F w}
            · (γ v ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} F w
               · (α^{ Mon_V }_{ v0, F v, F w}
                  · identity
                      (leftwhiskering_functor Mon_V v0
                         (F v ⊗_{ Mon_V} F w))))))))
  ⊗^{ ActV}_{r} x
· aα^{ ActV }_{ v0, F v ⊗_{ Mon_V} F w, x}
· v0 ⊗^{ ActV}_{l} aα^{ ActV }_{ F v, F w, x} =
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly U v w)
⊗^{ ActV}_{r} (v0 ⊗_{ ActV} x)
· aα^{ ActV }_{ F v, F w, v0 ⊗_{ ActV} x}
· F v
  ⊗^{ ActV}_{l} (aαinv^{ ActV }_{ F w, v0, x}
                 · γ w ⊗^{ ActV}_{r} x
                 · aα^{ ActV }_{ v0, F w, x})
· (aαinv^{ ActV }_{ F v, v0, F w ⊗_{ ActV} x}
   · γ v ⊗^{ ActV}_{r} (F w ⊗_{ ActV} x)
   · aα^{ ActV }_{ v0, F v, F w ⊗_{ ActV} x})

   · (α^{ Mon_V }_{ F v, F w, v0}
      · (F v ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} γ w

                 · γ w ⊗^{ ActV}_{r} x
                 · aα^{ ActV }_{ v0, F w, x})
· (aαinv^{ ActV }_{ F v, v0, F w ⊗_{ ActV} x}
   · γ v ⊗^{ ActV}_{r} (F w ⊗_{ ActV} x)

· (# (rightwhiskering_functor ActV x)
     (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly U v w)
      ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v0)
   · # (rightwhiskering_functor ActV x)

γ x · v0 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
v, w: W
x: C

⊗^{ ActV}_{r} (v0 ⊗_{ ActV} x)
· aαinv^{ ActV }_{ F v ⊗_{ Mon_V} F w, v0, x}
· (α^{ Mon_V }_{ F v, F w, v0}
   · (F v ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} γ w

· aα^{ ActV }_{ F v, F w, v0 ⊗_{ ActV} x}
· F v
  ⊗^{ ActV}_{l} (aαinv^{ ActV }_{ F w, v0, x}

· (aαinv^{ ActV }_{ F v, v0, F w ⊗_{ ActV} x}
   · γ v ⊗^{ ActV}_{r} (F w ⊗_{ ActV} x)

⊗^{ ActV}_{r} (v0 ⊗_{ ActV} x)
· (aαinv^{ ActV }_{ F v ⊗_{ Mon_V} F w, v0, x}
   · ((α^{ Mon_V }_{ F v, F w, v0}
       · (F v ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} γ w

             · (γ v ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} F w

      ⊗^{ ActV}_{r} x
      · (aα^{ ActV }_{ v0, F v ⊗_{ Mon_V} F w, x}
         · v0 ⊗^{ ActV}_{l} aα^{ ActV }_{ F v, F w, x}))) =
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly U v w)
⊗^{ ActV}_{r} (v0 ⊗_{ ActV} x)
· (aα^{ ActV }_{ F v, F w, v0 ⊗_{ ActV} x}
   · (F v
      ⊗^{ ActV}_{l} (aαinv^{ ActV }_{ F w, v0, x}
                     · (γ w ⊗^{ ActV}_{r} x
                        · aα^{ ActV }_{ v0, F w, x}))
      · (aαinv^{ ActV }_{ F v, v0, F w ⊗_{ ActV} x}
         · (γ v ⊗^{ ActV}_{r} (F w ⊗_{ ActV} x)

V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
W: category
Mon_W: monoidal W
F: W ⟶ V
U: fmonoidal Mon_W Mon_V F
v0: V
γ: relativelaxcommutator
C: category
ActV: actegory Mon_V C
γ_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v0 · γ x' =
γ x · v0 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
v, w: W
x: C
aαinv^{ ActV }_{ F v ⊗_{ Mon_V} F w, v0, x}
· ((α^{ Mon_V }_{ F v, F w, v0}
    · (F v ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} γ w
       · (αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ F v, v0, F w}
          · (γ v ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} F w
             · α^{ Mon_V }_{ v0, F v, F w}))))
   ⊗^{ ActV}_{r} x
   · (aα^{ ActV }_{ v0, F v ⊗_{ Mon_V} F w, x}
      · v0 ⊗^{ ActV}_{l} aα^{ ActV }_{ F v, F w, x})) =
aα^{ ActV }_{ F v, F w, v0 ⊗_{ ActV} x}
· (F v
   ⊗^{ ActV}_{l} (aαinv^{ ActV }_{ F w, v0, x}
                  · (γ w ⊗^{ ActV}_{r} x
                     · aα^{ ActV }_{ v0, F w, x}))
   · (aαinv^{ ActV }_{ F v, v0, F w ⊗_{ ActV} x}
      · (γ v ⊗^{ ActV}_{r} (F w ⊗_{ ActV} x)
         · aα^{ ActV }_{ v0, F v, F w ⊗_{ ActV} x})))

      (* the extra effort for having an abstract strong monoidal functor has now been accomplished *)
      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
W: category
Mon_W: monoidal W
F: W ⟶ V
U: fmonoidal Mon_W Mon_V F
v0: V
γ: relativelaxcommutator
C: category
ActV: actegory Mon_V C
γ_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v0 · γ x' =
γ x · v0 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
v, w: W
x: C
(α^{ Mon_V }_{ F v, F w, v0}
 · (F v ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} γ w
    · (αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ F v, v0, F w}
       · (γ v ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} F w
          · α^{ Mon_V }_{ v0, F v, F w}))))
⊗^{ ActV}_{r} x
· (aα^{ ActV }_{ v0, F v ⊗_{ Mon_V} F w, x}
   · v0 ⊗^{ ActV}_{l} aα^{ ActV }_{ F v, F w, x}) =
z_iso_from_actor_iso Mon_V ActV (F v ⊗_{ Mon_V} F w)
  v0 x
· (aα^{ ActV }_{ F v, F w, v0 ⊗_{ ActV} x}
   · (F v
      ⊗^{ ActV}_{l} (aαinv^{ ActV }_{ F w, v0, x}
                     · (γ w ⊗^{ ActV}_{r} x
                        · aα^{ ActV }_{ v0, F w, x}))
      · (aαinv^{ ActV }_{ F v, v0, F w ⊗_{ ActV} x}
         · (γ v ⊗^{ ActV}_{r} (F w ⊗_{ ActV} x)
            · aα^{ ActV }_{ v0, F v, F w ⊗_{ ActV} x}))))

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
W: category
Mon_W: monoidal W
F: W ⟶ V
U: fmonoidal Mon_W Mon_V F
v0: V
γ: relativelaxcommutator
C: category
ActV: actegory Mon_V C
γ_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v0 · γ x' =
γ x · v0 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
v, w: W
x: C
(α^{ Mon_V }_{ F v, F w, v0}
 · (F v ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} γ w
    · (αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ F v, v0, F w}
       · (γ v ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} F w
          · α^{ Mon_V }_{ v0, F v, F w}))))
⊗^{ ActV}_{r} x
· (aα^{ ActV }_{ v0, F v ⊗_{ Mon_V} F w, x}
   · v0 ⊗^{ ActV}_{l} aα^{ ActV }_{ F v, F w, x}) = 
?b
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
W: category
Mon_W: monoidal W
F: W ⟶ V
U: fmonoidal Mon_W Mon_V F
v0: V
γ: relativelaxcommutator
C: category
ActV: actegory Mon_V C
γ_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v0 · γ x' =
γ x · v0 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
v, w: W
x: C
?b =
z_iso_from_actor_iso Mon_V ActV 
  (F v ⊗_{ Mon_V} F w) v0 x
· (aα^{ ActV }_{ F v, F w, v0 ⊗_{ ActV} x}
   · (F v
      ⊗^{ ActV}_{l} (aαinv^{ ActV }_{ F w, v0, x}
                     · (γ w ⊗^{ ActV}_{r} x
                       · 
                       aα^{ ActV }_{ v0, F w, x}))
      · (aαinv^{ ActV }_{ F v, v0, F w ⊗_{ ActV} x}
         · (γ v ⊗^{ ActV}_{r} (F w ⊗_{ ActV} x)
            · aα^{ ActV }_{ v0, F v, F w ⊗_{ ActV} x}))))

(α^{ Mon_V }_{ F v, F w, v0}
 · (F v ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} γ w
    · (αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ F v, v0, F w}
       · (γ v ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} F w
          · α^{ Mon_V }_{ v0, F v, F w}))))

V: category

F: W ⟶ V
U: fmonoidal Mon_W Mon_V F
v0: V
γ: relativelaxcommutator
C: category
ActV: actegory Mon_V C
γ_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v0 · γ x' =
γ x · v0 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
v, w: W
x: C
(α^{ Mon_V }_{ F v, F w, v0}
 · (F v ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} γ w
    · (αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ F v, v0, F w}
       · (γ v ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} F w
          · α^{ Mon_V }_{ v0, F v, F w}))))
⊗^{ ActV}_{r} x = ?f'

        
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
W: category
Mon_W: monoidal W
F: W ⟶ V
U: fmonoidal Mon_W Mon_V F
v0: V
γ: relativelaxcommutator
C: category
ActV: actegory Mon_V C
γ_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v0 · γ x' =
γ x · v0 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
v, w: W
x: C
(α^{ Mon_V }_{ F v, F w, v0} · F v ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} γ w
 · αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ F v, v0, F w}
 · γ v ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} F w
 · α^{ Mon_V }_{ v0, F v, F w}) ⊗^{ ActV}_{r} x = 
?f'

        apply (functor_comp (rightwhiskering_functor ActV x)). 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
W: category
Mon_W: monoidal W
F: W ⟶ V
U: fmonoidal Mon_W Mon_V F
v0: V
γ: relativelaxcommutator
C: category
ActV: actegory Mon_V C
γ_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v0 · γ x' =
γ x · v0 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
v, w: W
x: C
# (rightwhiskering_functor ActV x)
  (α^{ Mon_V }_{ F v, F w, v0}
   · F v ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} γ w
   · αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ F v, v0, F w}
   · γ v ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} F w)
· # (rightwhiskering_functor ActV x)
    α^{ Mon_V }_{ v0, F v, F w}
· (aα^{ ActV }_{ v0, F v ⊗_{ Mon_V} F w, x}
   · v0 ⊗^{ ActV}_{l} aα^{ ActV }_{ F v, F w, x}) =
z_iso_from_actor_iso Mon_V ActV (F v ⊗_{ Mon_V} F w)
  v0 x
· (aα^{ ActV }_{ F v, F w, v0 ⊗_{ ActV} x}
   · (F v
      ⊗^{ ActV}_{l} (aαinv^{ ActV }_{ F w, v0, x}
                     · (γ w ⊗^{ ActV}_{r} x
                        · aα^{ ActV }_{ v0, F w, x}))
      · (aαinv^{ ActV }_{ F v, v0, F w ⊗_{ ActV} x}
         · (γ v ⊗^{ ActV}_{r} (F w ⊗_{ ActV} x)
            · aα^{ ActV }_{ v0, F v, F w ⊗_{ ActV} x}))))

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
W: category

F: W ⟶ V
U: fmonoidal Mon_W Mon_V F
v0: V
γ: relativelaxcommutator
C: category
ActV: actegory Mon_V C
γ_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v0 · γ x' =
γ x · v0 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
v, w: W
x: C
(α^{ Mon_V }_{ F v, F w, v0} · F v ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} γ w
 · αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ F v, v0, F w}
 · γ v ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} F w) ⊗^{ ActV}_{r} x
· α^{ Mon_V }_{ v0, F v, F w} ⊗^{ ActV}_{r} x
· (aα^{ ActV }_{ v0, F v ⊗_{ Mon_V} F w, x}
   · v0 ⊗^{ ActV}_{l} aα^{ ActV }_{ F v, F w, x}) =
aα^{ ActV }_{ F v ⊗_{ Mon_V} F w, v0, x}
· (aα^{ ActV }_{ F v, F w, v0 ⊗_{ ActV} x}
   · (F v
      ⊗^{ ActV}_{l} (aαinv^{ ActV }_{ F w, v0, x}
                     · (γ w ⊗^{ ActV}_{r} x
                        · aα^{ ActV }_{ v0, F w, x}))
      · (aαinv^{ ActV }_{ F v, v0, F w ⊗_{ ActV} x}
         · (γ v ⊗^{ ActV}_{r} (F w ⊗_{ ActV} x)
            · aα^{ ActV }_{ v0, F v, F w ⊗_{ ActV} x}))))

        apply actegory_pentagonidentity.
      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
W: category
Mon_W: monoidal W
F: W ⟶ V
U: fmonoidal Mon_W Mon_V F
v0: V
γ: relativelaxcommutator
C: category

γ_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v0 · γ x' =
γ x · v0 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
v, w: W
x: C
(α^{ Mon_V }_{ F v, F w, v0} · F v ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} γ w
 · αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ F v, v0, F w}
 · γ v ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} F w) ⊗^{ ActV}_{r} x
· (aα^{ ActV }_{ v0 ⊗_{ Mon_V} F v, F w, x}
   · aα^{ ActV }_{ v0, F v, F w ⊗_{ ActV} x}) =
aα^{ ActV }_{ F v ⊗_{ Mon_V} F w, v0, x}
· (aα^{ ActV }_{ F v, F w, v0 ⊗_{ ActV} x}
   · (F v
      ⊗^{ ActV}_{l} (aαinv^{ ActV }_{ F w, v0, x}
                     · (γ w ⊗^{ ActV}_{r} x
                        · aα^{ ActV }_{ v0, F w, x}))
      · (aαinv^{ ActV }_{ F v, v0, F w ⊗_{ ActV} x}
         · (γ v ⊗^{ ActV}_{r} (F w ⊗_{ ActV} x)
            · aα^{ ActV }_{ v0, F v, F w ⊗_{ ActV} x}))))

      
V: category

v0: V
γ: relativelaxcommutator
C: category

γ x · v0 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
v, w: W
x: C
(α^{ Mon_V }_{ F v, F w, v0} · F v ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} γ w
 · αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ F v, v0, F w}
 · γ v ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} F w) ⊗^{ ActV}_{r} x
· aα^{ ActV }_{ v0 ⊗_{ Mon_V} F v, F w, x}
· aα^{ ActV }_{ v0, F v, F w ⊗_{ ActV} x} =
aα^{ ActV }_{ F v ⊗_{ Mon_V} F w, v0, x}
· aα^{ ActV }_{ F v, F w, v0 ⊗_{ ActV} x}
· F v
  ⊗^{ ActV}_{l} (aαinv^{ ActV }_{ F w, v0, x}
                 · γ w ⊗^{ ActV}_{r} x
                 · aα^{ ActV }_{ v0, F w, x})
· aαinv^{ ActV }_{ F v, v0, F w ⊗_{ ActV} x}
· γ v ⊗^{ ActV}_{r} (F w ⊗_{ ActV} x)
· aα^{ ActV }_{ v0, F v, F w ⊗_{ ActV} x}

      
V: category

v0: V

(α^{ Mon_V }_{ F v, F w, v0} · F v ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} γ w
 · αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ F v, v0, F w}
 · γ v ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} F w) ⊗^{ ActV}_{r} x
· aα^{ ActV }_{ v0 ⊗_{ Mon_V} F v, F w, x} =

· F v
  ⊗^{ ActV}_{l} (aαinv^{ ActV }_{ F w, v0, x}

                 · aα^{ ActV }_{ v0, F w, x})
· aαinv^{ ActV }_{ F v, v0, F w ⊗_{ ActV} x}

v, w: W
x: C
(α^{ Mon_V }_{ F v, F w, v0} · F v ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} γ w
 · αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ F v, v0, F w}
 · γ v ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} F w) ⊗^{ ActV}_{r} x
· aα^{ ActV }_{ v0 ⊗_{ Mon_V} F v, F w, x} = ?b

γ x · v0 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
v, w: W

(α^{ Mon_V }_{ F v, F w, v0} · F v ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} γ w
 · αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ F v, v0, F w}
 · γ v ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} F w) ⊗^{ ActV}_{r} x = ?f'

(α^{ Mon_V }_{ F v, F w, v0}
 · (F v ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} γ w

        apply (functor_comp (rightwhiskering_functor ActV x)). 
V: category

γ x · v0 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
v, w: W
x: C
# (rightwhiskering_functor ActV x)
  α^{ Mon_V }_{ F v, F w, v0}
· # (rightwhiskering_functor ActV x)
    (F v ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} γ w
     · (αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ F v, v0, F w}
        · γ v ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} F w))
· aα^{ ActV }_{ v0 ⊗_{ Mon_V} F v, F w, x} =

· aα^{ ActV }_{ F v, F w ⊗_{ Mon_V} v0, x}
· F v ⊗^{ ActV}_{l} aα^{ ActV }_{ F w, v0, x}
· F v
  ⊗^{ ActV}_{l} (aαinv^{ ActV }_{ F w, v0, x}
                 · γ w ⊗^{ ActV}_{r} x
                 · aα^{ ActV }_{ v0, F w, x})
· aαinv^{ ActV }_{ F v, v0, F w ⊗_{ ActV} x}
· γ v ⊗^{ ActV}_{r} (F w ⊗_{ ActV} x)

α^{ Mon_V }_{ F v, F w, v0} ⊗^{ ActV}_{r} x
· (F v ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} γ w

                 · aα^{ ActV }_{ v0, F w, x})

· γ v ⊗^{ ActV}_{r} (F w ⊗_{ ActV} x)

Mon_W: monoidal W
F: W ⟶ V
U: fmonoidal Mon_W Mon_V F
v0: V
γ: relativelaxcommutator
C: category
ActV: actegory Mon_V C
γ_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v0 · γ x' =
γ x · v0 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
v, w: W
x: C
(F v ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} γ w
 · (αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ F v, v0, F w}
    · γ v ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} F w)) ⊗^{ ActV}_{r} x
· aα^{ ActV }_{ v0 ⊗_{ Mon_V} F v, F w, x} =
aα^{ ActV }_{ F v, F w ⊗_{ Mon_V} v0, x}
· (F v
   ⊗^{ ActV}_{l} (γ w ⊗^{ ActV}_{r} x
                  · aα^{ ActV }_{ v0, F w, x})
   · aαinv^{ ActV }_{ F v, v0, F w ⊗_{ ActV} x}
   · γ v ⊗^{ ActV}_{r} (F w ⊗_{ ActV} x))

    · γ v ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} F w)) ⊗^{ ActV}_{r} x
· aα^{ ActV }_{ v0 ⊗_{ Mon_V} F v, F w, x} = ?b

 · (αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ F v, v0, F w}

V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
W: category
Mon_W: monoidal W
F: W ⟶ V
U: fmonoidal Mon_W Mon_V F
v0: V
γ: relativelaxcommutator
C: category
ActV: actegory Mon_V C
γ_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v0 · γ x' =
γ x · v0 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
v, w: W
x: C
# (rightwhiskering_functor ActV x)
  (F v ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} γ w)
· # (rightwhiskering_functor ActV x)
    (αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ F v, v0, F w}
     · γ v ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} F w)
· aα^{ ActV }_{ v0 ⊗_{ Mon_V} F v, F w, x} =
(F v ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} γ w) ⊗^{ ActV}_{r} x
· aα^{ ActV }_{ F v, v0 ⊗_{ Mon_V} F w, x}
· F v ⊗^{ ActV}_{l} aα^{ ActV }_{ v0, F w, x}
· aαinv^{ ActV }_{ F v, v0, F w ⊗_{ ActV} x}
· γ v ⊗^{ ActV}_{r} (F w ⊗_{ ActV} x)

v, w: W
x: C
(F v ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} γ w) ⊗^{ ActV}_{r} x
· (αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ F v, v0, F w}
   · γ v ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} F w) ⊗^{ ActV}_{r} x
· aα^{ ActV }_{ v0 ⊗_{ Mon_V} F v, F w, x} =

· aα^{ ActV }_{ v0 ⊗_{ Mon_V} F v, F w, x} = ?b
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
W: category
Mon_W: monoidal W
F: W ⟶ V
U: fmonoidal Mon_W Mon_V F
v0: V
γ: relativelaxcommutator
C: category
ActV: actegory Mon_V C
γ_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v0 · γ x' =
γ x · v0 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
v, w: W
x: C
(αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ F v, v0, F w}
 · γ v ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} F w) ⊗^{ ActV}_{r} x = ?f'

        apply (functor_comp (rightwhiskering_functor ActV x)). 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
W: category

γ: relativelaxcommutator

γ x · v0 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
v, w: W
x: C
# (rightwhiskering_functor ActV x)
  αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ F v, v0, F w}
· # (rightwhiskering_functor ActV x)
    (γ v ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} F w)
· aα^{ ActV }_{ v0 ⊗_{ Mon_V} F v, F w, x} =
aα^{ ActV }_{ F v, v0 ⊗_{ Mon_V} F w, x}
· (F v ⊗^{ ActV}_{l} aα^{ ActV }_{ v0, F w, x}
   · (aαinv^{ ActV }_{ F v, v0, F w ⊗_{ ActV} x}
      · γ v ⊗^{ ActV}_{r} (F w ⊗_{ ActV} x)))

γ x · v0 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
v, w: W
x: C
αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ F v, v0, F w}
· α^{ Mon_V }_{ F v, v0, F w} =
identity (F v ⊗_{ Mon_V} (v0 ⊗_{ Mon_V} F w))

           apply (pr2 (monoidal_associatorisolaw Mon_V _ _ _)).

Mon_V: monoidal V

x: C

· F v ⊗^{ ActV}_{l} aα^{ ActV }_{ v0, F w, x} =
identity
  (rightwhiskering_functor ActV x
     (F v ⊗_{ Mon_V} (v0 ⊗_{ Mon_V} F w)))
· aα^{ ActV }_{ F v, v0 ⊗_{ Mon_V} F w, x}

· F v ⊗^{ ActV}_{l} aα^{ ActV }_{ v0, F w, x} =

      apply idpath.
    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
W: category
Mon_W: monoidal W
F: W ⟶ V
U: fmonoidal Mon_W Mon_V F
v0: V
γ: relativelaxcommutator
C: category
ActV: actegory Mon_V C
γ_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v0 · γ x' =
γ x · v0 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
x: C
aαinv^{ ActV }_{ F I_{ Mon_W}, v0, x}
· γ I_{ Mon_W} ⊗^{ ActV}_{r} x
· aα^{ ActV }_{ v0, F I_{ Mon_W}, x}
· v0
  ⊗^{ ActV}_{l} (pr1
                   (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly U)
                 ⊗^{ ActV}_{r} x · au^{ ActV }_{ x}) =
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly U)
⊗^{ ActV}_{r} (v0 ⊗_{ ActV} x)
· au^{ ActV }_{ v0 ⊗_{ ActV} x}

C: category
ActV: actegory Mon_V C
γ_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v0 · γ x' =
γ x · v0 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
x: C
aαinv^{ ActV }_{ F I_{ Mon_W}, v0, x}
· γ I_{ Mon_W} ⊗^{ ActV}_{r} x
· aα^{ ActV }_{ v0, F I_{ Mon_W}, x}
· v0
  ⊗^{ ActV}_{l} (pr1
                   (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly U)
                 ⊗^{ ActV}_{r} x · au^{ ActV }_{ x}) =
?b

⊗^{ ActV}_{r} (v0 ⊗_{ ActV} x)

Mon_W: monoidal W
F: W ⟶ V
U: fmonoidal Mon_W Mon_V F
v0: V
γ: relativelaxcommutator
C: category
ActV: actegory Mon_V C
γ_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),

γ x · v0 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f

aαinv^{ ActV }_{ F I_{ Mon_W}, v0, x}
· γ I_{ Mon_W} ⊗^{ ActV}_{r} x
· aα^{ ActV }_{ v0, F I_{ Mon_W}, x}
· (# (leftwhiskering_functor ActV v0)
     (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly U)
      ⊗^{ ActV}_{r} x)
   · # (leftwhiskering_functor ActV v0)
       au^{ ActV }_{ x}) =
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly U)
⊗^{ ActV}_{r} (v0 ⊗_{ ActV} x)
· au^{ ActV }_{ v0 ⊗_{ ActV} x}

γ_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v0 · γ x' =
γ x · v0 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
x: C
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly U)
⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v0
· (lu^{ Mon_V }_{ v0}
   · (ruinv^{ Mon_V }_{ v0}
      · (v0 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} fmonoidal_preservesunit U
         · v0
           ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} pr1
                            (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
                               U)))) = ?t2

γ_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v0 · γ x' =
γ x · v0 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
x: C
v0 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} fmonoidal_preservesunit U
· v0
  ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} pr1
                   (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly U) =
?t2

γ_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),

V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
W: category
Mon_W: monoidal W
F: W ⟶ V
U: fmonoidal Mon_W Mon_V F
v0: V
γ: relativelaxcommutator
C: category
ActV: actegory Mon_V C
γ_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v0 · γ x' =
γ x · v0 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
x: C
fmonoidal_preservesunit U
· pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly U) =
identity I_{ Mon_V}

        apply (pr2 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly U)).
      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
W: category
Mon_W: monoidal W
F: W ⟶ V
U: fmonoidal Mon_W Mon_V F
v0: V
γ: relativelaxcommutator
C: category
ActV: actegory Mon_V C
γ_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v0 · γ x' =
γ x · v0 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
x: C
aαinv^{ ActV }_{ F I_{ Mon_W}, v0, x}
· (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly U)
   ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v0
   · (lu^{ Mon_V }_{ v0}
      · (ruinv^{ Mon_V }_{ v0}
         · identity
             (leftwhiskering_functor Mon_V v0
                I_{ Mon_V})))) ⊗^{ ActV}_{r} x
· aα^{ ActV }_{ v0, I_{ Mon_V}, x}
· v0 ⊗^{ ActV}_{l} au^{ ActV }_{ x} =
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly U)
⊗^{ ActV}_{r} (v0 ⊗_{ ActV} x)
· au^{ ActV }_{ v0 ⊗_{ ActV} x}

· ((lu^{ Mon_V }_{ v0} · ruinv^{ Mon_V }_{ v0})
   ⊗^{ ActV}_{r} x
   · (aα^{ ActV }_{ v0, I_{ Mon_V}, x}
      · v0 ⊗^{ ActV}_{l} au^{ ActV }_{ x})) =
au^{ ActV }_{ v0 ⊗_{ ActV} x}

      (* the extra effort for having an abstract strong monoidal functor has now been accomplished *)

γ_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v0 · γ x' =
γ x · v0 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
x: C
?b = au^{ ActV }_{ v0 ⊗_{ ActV} x}

γ x · v0 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
x: C
aαinv^{ ActV }_{ I_{ Mon_V}, v0, x}
· ((lu^{ Mon_V }_{ v0} · ruinv^{ Mon_V }_{ v0})
   ⊗^{ ActV}_{r} x
   · ru^{ Mon_V }_{ v0} ⊗^{ ActV}_{r} x) = ?b

  Definition reindexedstrength_from_commutator: reindexedstrength Mon_V Mon_W U ActV ActV FF :=
    lineator_data_from_commutator,,lineator_laxlaws_from_commutator.

End ActegoryMorphismFromRelativeLaxCommutator.

End FixAnObject.

Arguments reindexedstrength_from_commutator _ _ {_} _.
Arguments relativelaxcommutator _ : clear implicits.
Arguments relativelaxcommutator_data _ : clear implicits.

V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
W: category
Mon_W: monoidal W
F: W ⟶ V
U: fmonoidal Mon_W Mon_V F
w, w': W
ru^{ Mon_V }_{ F (w ⊗_{ Mon_W} w')}
· luinv^{ Mon_V }_{ F (w ⊗_{ Mon_W} w')} =
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly U w w')
⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} I_{ Mon_V}
· α^{ Mon_V }_{ F w, F w', I_{ Mon_V}}
· F w
  ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ F w'}
                  · luinv^{ Mon_V }_{ F w'})
· αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ F w, I_{ Mon_V}, F w'}
· (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ F w} · luinv^{ Mon_V }_{ F w})
  ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} F w'
· α^{ Mon_V }_{ I_{ Mon_V}, F w, F w'}
· I_{ Mon_V}
  ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} fmonoidal_preservestensordata U w w'

w, w': W

· luinv^{ Mon_V }_{ F (w ⊗_{ Mon_W} w')} = ?b

w, w': W

· luinv^{ Mon_V }_{ F (w ⊗_{ Mon_W} w')} =

⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} I_{ Mon_V}
· (α^{ Mon_V }_{ F w, F w', I_{ Mon_V}}
   · (# (leftwhiskering_functor Mon_V (F w))

      · # (leftwhiskering_functor Mon_V (F w))
          luinv^{ Mon_V }_{ F w'}))
· αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ F w, I_{ Mon_V}, F w'}

     ru^{ Mon_V }_{ F w}
   · # (rightwhiskering_functor Mon_V (F w'))

  ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} fmonoidal_preservestensordata U w w'

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
W: category
Mon_W: monoidal W
F: W ⟶ V
U: fmonoidal Mon_W Mon_V F
w, w': W
ru^{ Mon_V }_{ F (w ⊗_{ Mon_W} w')}
· luinv^{ Mon_V }_{ F (w ⊗_{ Mon_W} w')} =
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly U w w')
⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} I_{ Mon_V}
· (α^{ Mon_V }_{ F w, F w', I_{ Mon_V}}
   · (F w ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} ru^{ Mon_V }_{ F w'}
      · F w ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} luinv^{ Mon_V }_{ F w'}))
· αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ F w, I_{ Mon_V}, F w'}
· (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ F w} ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} F w'
   · luinv^{ Mon_V }_{ F w} ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} F w')

  ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} fmonoidal_preservestensordata U w w'

V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
W: category
Mon_W: monoidal W
F: W ⟶ V
U: fmonoidal Mon_W Mon_V F
w, w': W
?b =
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly U w w')
⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} I_{ Mon_V}
· (ru^{ Mon_V }_{ F w ⊗_{ Mon_V} F w'}
   · (luinv^{ Mon_V }_{ F w ⊗_{ Mon_V} F w'}
      · I_{ Mon_V}
        ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} fmonoidal_preservestensordata U
                       w w'))

w, w': W

· identity (F (w ⊗_{ Mon_W} w'))

    apply pathsinv0, id_right.
  Qed.

· I_{ Mon_V} ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} fmonoidal_preservesunit U

Section CompositionOfRelativeLaxCommutators.

  Context (v1 v2 : V) (γ1 : relativelaxcommutator v1) (γ2 : relativelaxcommutator v2).

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
W: category
Mon_W: monoidal W
F: W ⟶ V
U: fmonoidal Mon_W Mon_V F
v1, v2: V
γ1: relativelaxcommutator v1
γ2: relativelaxcommutator v2
relativelaxcommutator_data (v1 ⊗_{ Mon_V} v2)

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
W: category
Mon_W: monoidal W
F: W ⟶ V
U: fmonoidal Mon_W Mon_V F
v1, v2: V
γ1: relativelaxcommutator v1
γ2: relativelaxcommutator v2
relativelaxcommutator_data (v1 ⊗_{ Mon_V} v2)

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
W: category
Mon_W: monoidal W
F: W ⟶ V
U: fmonoidal Mon_W Mon_V F
v1, v2: V
γ1: relativelaxcommutator v1
γ2: relativelaxcommutator v2
w: W
V ⟦ F w ⊗_{ Mon_V} (v1 ⊗_{ Mon_V} v2),
(v1 ⊗_{ Mon_V} v2) ⊗_{ Mon_V} F w ⟧

    exact (αinv_{Mon_V} _ _ _ · γ1 w ⊗^{Mon_V}_{r} v2 · α_{Mon_V} _ _ _
             · v1 ⊗^{Mon_V}_{l} γ2 w · αinv_{Mon_V} _ _ _).
  Defined.

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
W: category
Mon_W: monoidal W
F: W ⟶ V
U: fmonoidal Mon_W Mon_V F
v1, v2: V
γ1: relativelaxcommutator v1
γ2: relativelaxcommutator v2
relativelaxcommutator_nat
  composedrelativelaxcommutator_data

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
W: category
Mon_W: monoidal W
F: W ⟶ V
U: fmonoidal Mon_W Mon_V F
v1, v2: V
γ1: relativelaxcommutator v1
γ2: relativelaxcommutator v2
relativelaxcommutator_nat
  composedrelativelaxcommutator_data

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
W: category
Mon_W: monoidal W
F: W ⟶ V
U: fmonoidal Mon_W Mon_V F
v1, v2: V
γ1: relativelaxcommutator v1
γ2: relativelaxcommutator v2
x, x': W
f: W ⟦ x, x' ⟧
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} (v1 ⊗_{ Mon_V} v2)
· (αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ F x', v1, v2}
   · γ1 x' ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2
   · α^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, F x', v2}
   · v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} γ2 x'
   · αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, v2, F x'}) =
αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ F x, v1, v2} · γ1 x ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2
· α^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, F x, v2} · v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} γ2 x
· αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, v2, F x}
· (v1 ⊗_{ Mon_V} v2) ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
W: category
Mon_W: monoidal W
F: W ⟶ V
U: fmonoidal Mon_W Mon_V F
v1, v2: V
γ1: relativelaxcommutator v1
γ2: relativelaxcommutator v2
x, x': W
f: W ⟦ x, x' ⟧
γ1_nat: relativelaxcommutator_nat γ1
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} (v1 ⊗_{ Mon_V} v2)
· (αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ F x', v1, v2}
   · γ1 x' ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2
   · α^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, F x', v2}
   · v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} γ2 x'
   · αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, v2, F x'}) =
αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ F x, v1, v2} · γ1 x ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2
· α^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, F x, v2} · v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} γ2 x
· αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, v2, F x}
· (v1 ⊗_{ Mon_V} v2) ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
W: category
Mon_W: monoidal W
F: W ⟶ V
U: fmonoidal Mon_W Mon_V F
v1, v2: V
γ1: relativelaxcommutator v1
γ2: relativelaxcommutator v2
x, x': W
f: W ⟦ x, x' ⟧
γ1_nat: relativelaxcommutator_nat γ1
γ2_nat: relativelaxcommutator_nat γ2
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} (v1 ⊗_{ Mon_V} v2)
· (αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ F x', v1, v2}
   · γ1 x' ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2
   · α^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, F x', v2}
   · v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} γ2 x'
   · αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, v2, F x'}) =
αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ F x, v1, v2} · γ1 x ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2
· α^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, F x, v2} · v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} γ2 x
· αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, v2, F x}
· (v1 ⊗_{ Mon_V} v2) ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
W: category
Mon_W: monoidal W
F: W ⟶ V
U: fmonoidal Mon_W Mon_V F
v1, v2: V
γ1: relativelaxcommutator v1
γ2: relativelaxcommutator v2
x, x': W
f: W ⟦ x, x' ⟧
γ1_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v1 · γ1 x' =
γ1 x · v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
γ2_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2 · γ2 x' =
γ2 x · v2 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} (v1 ⊗_{ Mon_V} v2)
· (αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ F x', v1, v2}
   · γ1 x' ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2
   · α^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, F x', v2}
   · v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} γ2 x'
   · αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, v2, F x'}) =
αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ F x, v1, v2} · γ1 x ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2
· α^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, F x, v2} · v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} γ2 x
· αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, v2, F x}
· (v1 ⊗_{ Mon_V} v2) ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
W: category
Mon_W: monoidal W
F: W ⟶ V
U: fmonoidal Mon_W Mon_V F
v1, v2: V
γ1: relativelaxcommutator v1
γ2: relativelaxcommutator v2
x, x': W
f: W ⟦ x, x' ⟧
γ1_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v1 · γ1 x' =
γ1 x · v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
γ2_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2 · γ2 x' =
γ2 x · v2 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} (v1 ⊗_{ Mon_V} v2)
· (αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ F x', v1, v2}
   · γ1 x' ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2
   · α^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, F x', v2}
   · v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} γ2 x'
   · αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, v2, F x'}) = ?b
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
W: category
Mon_W: monoidal W
F: W ⟶ V
U: fmonoidal Mon_W Mon_V F
v1, v2: V
γ1: relativelaxcommutator v1
γ2: relativelaxcommutator v2
x, x': W
f: W ⟦ x, x' ⟧
γ1_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v1 · γ1 x' =
γ1 x · v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
γ2_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2 · γ2 x' =
γ2 x · v2 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
?b =
αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ F x, v1, v2} · γ1 x ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2
· α^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, F x, v2} · 
v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} γ2 x · 
αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, v2, F x}
· (v1 ⊗_{ Mon_V} v2) ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
W: category
Mon_W: monoidal W
F: W ⟶ V
U: fmonoidal Mon_W Mon_V F
v1, v2: V
γ1: relativelaxcommutator v1
γ2: relativelaxcommutator v2
x, x': W
f: W ⟦ x, x' ⟧
γ1_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v1 · γ1 x' =
γ1 x · v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
γ2_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2 · γ2 x' =
γ2 x · v2 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} (v1 ⊗_{ Mon_V} v2)
· (αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ F x', v1, v2}
   · γ1 x' ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2
   · α^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, F x', v2}
   · v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} γ2 x'
   · αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, v2, F x'}) = ?b
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
W: category
Mon_W: monoidal W

U: fmonoidal Mon_W Mon_V F
v1, v2: V
γ1: relativelaxcommutator v1
γ2: relativelaxcommutator v2
x, x': W
f: W ⟦ x, x' ⟧
γ1_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v1 · γ1 x' =
γ1 x · v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
γ2_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2 · γ2 x' =
γ2 x · v2 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} (v1 ⊗_{ Mon_V} v2)
· αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ F x', v1, v2}
· γ1 x' ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2
· α^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, F x', v2}
· v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} γ2 x'
· αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, v2, F x'} = ?b

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
W: category
Mon_W: monoidal W
F: W ⟶ V
U: fmonoidal Mon_W Mon_V F
v1, v2: V

γ2: relativelaxcommutator v2
x, x': W
f: W ⟦ x, x' ⟧
γ1_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v1 · γ1 x' =
γ1 x · v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
γ2_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2 · γ2 x' =
γ2 x · v2 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} (v1 ⊗_{ Mon_V} v2)
· αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ F x', v1, v2} = ?f'

      apply monoidal_associatorinvnatright. 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
W: category
Mon_W: monoidal W
F: W ⟶ V
U: fmonoidal Mon_W Mon_V F
v1, v2: V
γ1: relativelaxcommutator v1
γ2: relativelaxcommutator v2
x, x': W
f: W ⟦ x, x' ⟧
γ1_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v1 · γ1 x' =
γ1 x · v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
γ2_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2 · γ2 x' =
γ2 x · v2 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ F x, v1, v2}
· (# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v1) ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2
· γ1 x' ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2
· α^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, F x', v2}
· v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} γ2 x'
· αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, v2, F x'} =
αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ F x, v1, v2} · γ1 x ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2
· α^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, F x, v2} · v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} γ2 x
· αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, v2, F x}
· (v1 ⊗_{ Mon_V} v2) ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
W: category
Mon_W: monoidal W
F: W ⟶ V
U: fmonoidal Mon_W Mon_V F
v1, v2: V
γ1: relativelaxcommutator v1
γ2: relativelaxcommutator v2
x, x': W
f: W ⟦ x, x' ⟧
γ1_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v1 · γ1 x' =
γ1 x · v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
γ2_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2 · γ2 x' =
γ2 x · v2 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ F x, v1, v2}
· ((# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v1) ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2
   · (γ1 x' ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2
      · (α^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, F x', v2}
         · (v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} γ2 x'
            · αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, v2, F x'})))) =
αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ F x, v1, v2}
· (γ1 x ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2
   · (α^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, F x, v2}
      · (v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} γ2 x
         · (αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, v2, F x}
            · (v1 ⊗_{ Mon_V} v2) ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f))))

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
W: category
Mon_W: monoidal W
F: W ⟶ V
U: fmonoidal Mon_W Mon_V F
v1, v2: V
γ1: relativelaxcommutator v1
γ2: relativelaxcommutator v2
x, x': W
f: W ⟦ x, x' ⟧
γ1_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v1 · γ1 x' =
γ1 x · v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
γ2_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2 · γ2 x' =
γ2 x · v2 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
(# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v1) ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2
· (γ1 x' ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2
   · (α^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, F x', v2}
      · (v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} γ2 x'
         · αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, v2, F x'}))) =
γ1 x ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2
· (α^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, F x, v2}
   · (v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} γ2 x
      · (αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, v2, F x}
         · (v1 ⊗_{ Mon_V} v2) ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f)))

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
W: category
Mon_W: monoidal W
F: W ⟶ V
U: fmonoidal Mon_W Mon_V F
v1, v2: V

γ2: relativelaxcommutator v2
x, x': W
f: W ⟦ x, x' ⟧
γ1_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v1 · γ1 x' =
γ1 x · v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
γ2_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2 · γ2 x' =
γ2 x · v2 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
(# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v1) ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2
· (γ1 x' ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2
   · (α^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, F x', v2}
      · (v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} γ2 x'
         · αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, v2, F x'}))) = ?b

Mon_V: monoidal V
W: category
Mon_W: monoidal W

γ2: relativelaxcommutator v2

γ1_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),

γ1 x · v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f

# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2 · γ2 x' =
γ2 x · v2 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
?b =

· (α^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, F x, v2}
   · (v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} γ2 x

# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2 · γ2 x' =
γ2 x · v2 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f

· γ1 x' ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2

      apply pathsinv0, (functor_comp (rightwhiskering_functor Mon_V v2)). 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
W: category
Mon_W: monoidal W
F: W ⟶ V
U: fmonoidal Mon_W Mon_V F
v1, v2: V
γ1: relativelaxcommutator v1
γ2: relativelaxcommutator v2
x, x': W
f: W ⟦ x, x' ⟧
γ1_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v1 · γ1 x' =
γ1 x · v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
γ2_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2 · γ2 x' =
γ2 x · v2 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
# (rightwhiskering_functor Mon_V v2)
  (# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v1 · γ1 x')
· (α^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, F x', v2}
   · (v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} γ2 x'
      · αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, v2, F x'})) =
γ1 x ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2
· (α^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, F x, v2}
   · (v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} γ2 x
      · (αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, v2, F x}
         · (v1 ⊗_{ Mon_V} v2) ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f)))

γ2_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),

γ2 x · v2 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f

V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
W: category
Mon_W: monoidal W
F: W ⟶ V
U: fmonoidal Mon_W Mon_V F
v1, v2: V
γ1: relativelaxcommutator v1
γ2: relativelaxcommutator v2
x, x': W
f: W ⟦ x, x' ⟧
γ1_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v1 · γ1 x' =
γ1 x · v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
γ2_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2 · γ2 x' =
γ2 x · v2 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
(γ1 x · v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f) ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2
· (α^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, F x', v2}
   · (v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} γ2 x'
      · αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, v2, F x'})) = ?b
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
W: category
Mon_W: monoidal W
F: W ⟶ V
U: fmonoidal Mon_W Mon_V F
v1, v2: V
γ1: relativelaxcommutator v1
γ2: relativelaxcommutator v2
x, x': W
f: W ⟦ x, x' ⟧
γ1_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v1 · γ1 x' =
γ1 x · v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
γ2_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2 · γ2 x' =
γ2 x · v2 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
(γ1 x · v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f) ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2
· α^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, F x', v2}
· (v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} γ2 x'
   · αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, v2, F x'}) = ?b

      
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
W: category
Mon_W: monoidal W
F: W ⟶ V
U: fmonoidal Mon_W Mon_V F
v1, v2: V
γ1: relativelaxcommutator v1
γ2: relativelaxcommutator v2
x, x': W
f: W ⟦ x, x' ⟧
γ1_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v1 · γ1 x' =
γ1 x · v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
γ2_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2 · γ2 x' =
γ2 x · v2 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
(γ1 x · v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f) ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2 =
?f'

      apply (functor_comp (rightwhiskering_functor Mon_V v2)). 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
W: category
Mon_W: monoidal W
F: W ⟶ V
U: fmonoidal Mon_W Mon_V F
v1, v2: V
γ1: relativelaxcommutator v1
γ2: relativelaxcommutator v2
x, x': W
f: W ⟦ x, x' ⟧
γ1_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v1 · γ1 x' =
γ1 x · v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
γ2_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2 · γ2 x' =
γ2 x · v2 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
# (rightwhiskering_functor Mon_V v2) (γ1 x)
· # (rightwhiskering_functor Mon_V v2)
    (v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f)
· α^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, F x', v2}
· (v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} γ2 x'
   · αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, v2, F x'}) =
γ1 x ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2
· (α^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, F x, v2}
   · (v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} γ2 x
      · (αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, v2, F x}
         · (v1 ⊗_{ Mon_V} v2) ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f)))

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
W: category
Mon_W: monoidal W
F: W ⟶ V
U: fmonoidal Mon_W Mon_V F
v1, v2: V
γ1: relativelaxcommutator v1
γ2: relativelaxcommutator v2
x, x': W
f: W ⟦ x, x' ⟧
γ1_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v1 · γ1 x' =
γ1 x · v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
γ2_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2 · γ2 x' =
γ2 x · v2 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
γ1 x ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2
· (v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f) ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2
· α^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, F x', v2}
· (v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} γ2 x'
   · αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, v2, F x'}) =
γ1 x ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2
· (α^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, F x, v2}
   · (v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} γ2 x
      · (αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, v2, F x}
         · (v1 ⊗_{ Mon_V} v2) ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f)))

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
W: category
Mon_W: monoidal W
F: W ⟶ V
U: fmonoidal Mon_W Mon_V F
v1, v2: V
γ1: relativelaxcommutator v1
γ2: relativelaxcommutator v2
x, x': W
f: W ⟦ x, x' ⟧
γ1_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v1 · γ1 x' =
γ1 x · v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
γ2_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2 · γ2 x' =
γ2 x · v2 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
γ1 x ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2
· ((v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f) ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2
   · (α^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, F x', v2}
      · (v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} γ2 x'
         · αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, v2, F x'}))) =
γ1 x ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2
· (α^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, F x, v2}
   · (v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} γ2 x
      · (αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, v2, F x}
         · (v1 ⊗_{ Mon_V} v2) ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f)))

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
W: category
Mon_W: monoidal W
F: W ⟶ V
U: fmonoidal Mon_W Mon_V F
v1, v2: V

γ2: relativelaxcommutator v2

f: W ⟦ x, x' ⟧
γ1_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v1 · γ1 x' =
γ1 x · v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
γ2_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2 · γ2 x' =
γ2 x · v2 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
(v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f) ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2
· (α^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, F x', v2}
   · (v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} γ2 x'
      · αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, v2, F x'})) =
α^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, F x, v2}
· (v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} γ2 x
   · (αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, v2, F x}
      · (v1 ⊗_{ Mon_V} v2) ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f))

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
W: category
Mon_W: monoidal W
F: W ⟶ V
U: fmonoidal Mon_W Mon_V F
v1, v2: V
γ1: relativelaxcommutator v1
γ2: relativelaxcommutator v2
x, x': W
f: W ⟦ x, x' ⟧
γ1_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v1 · γ1 x' =
γ1 x · v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
γ2_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2 · γ2 x' =
γ2 x · v2 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
(v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f) ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2
· (α^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, F x', v2}
   · (v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} γ2 x'
      · αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, v2, F x'})) = ?b
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
W: category
Mon_W: monoidal W
F: W ⟶ V
U: fmonoidal Mon_W Mon_V F
v1, v2: V
γ1: relativelaxcommutator v1
γ2: relativelaxcommutator v2
x, x': W
f: W ⟦ x, x' ⟧
γ1_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v1 · γ1 x' =
γ1 x · v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
γ2_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2 · γ2 x' =
γ2 x · v2 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
?b =
α^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, F x, v2}
· (v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} γ2 x
   · (αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, v2, F x}
      · (v1 ⊗_{ Mon_V} v2) ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f))

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
W: category
Mon_W: monoidal W
F: W ⟶ V
U: fmonoidal Mon_W Mon_V F

γ2: relativelaxcommutator v2
x, x': W
f: W ⟦ x, x' ⟧
γ1_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v1 · γ1 x' =
γ1 x · v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
γ2_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2 · γ2 x' =
γ2 x · v2 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
?b =
α^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, F x, v2}
· (v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} γ2 x
   · (αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, v2, F x}
      · (v1 ⊗_{ Mon_V} v2) ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f))
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
W: category
Mon_W: monoidal W
F: W ⟶ V
U: fmonoidal Mon_W Mon_V F
v1, v2: V
γ1: relativelaxcommutator v1
γ2: relativelaxcommutator v2
x, x': W
f: W ⟦ x, x' ⟧
γ1_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v1 · γ1 x' =
γ1 x · v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
γ2_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2 · γ2 x' =
γ2 x · v2 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
?t1 =
αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, v2, F x}
· (v1 ⊗_{ Mon_V} v2) ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f

         apply monoidal_associatorinvnatleft. 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
W: category
Mon_W: monoidal W
F: W ⟶ V
U: fmonoidal Mon_W Mon_V F
v1, v2: V
γ1: relativelaxcommutator v1
γ2: relativelaxcommutator v2
x, x': W
f: W ⟦ x, x' ⟧
γ1_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v1 · γ1 x' =
γ1 x · v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
γ2_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2 · γ2 x' =
γ2 x · v2 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
(v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f) ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2
· (α^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, F x', v2}
   · (v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} γ2 x'
      · αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, v2, F x'})) =
α^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, F x, v2}
· (v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} γ2 x
   · (v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} (v2 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f)
      · αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, v2, F x'}))

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
W: category
Mon_W: monoidal W
F: W ⟶ V
U: fmonoidal Mon_W Mon_V F
v1, v2: V
γ1: relativelaxcommutator v1
γ2: relativelaxcommutator v2
x, x': W
f: W ⟦ x, x' ⟧
γ1_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v1 · γ1 x' =
γ1 x · v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
γ2_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2 · γ2 x' =
γ2 x · v2 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
(v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f) ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2
· α^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, F x', v2}
· v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} γ2 x'
· αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, v2, F x'} =
α^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, F x, v2} · v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} γ2 x
· v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} (v2 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f)
· αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, v2, F x'}

· v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} (v2 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f)

· v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} (v2 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f)

· # (leftwhiskering_functor Mon_V v1)
    (γ2 x · v2 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f)

# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2 · γ2 x' =
γ2 x · v2 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
(v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f) ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2
· α^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, F x', v2}
· v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} γ2 x' =
α^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, F x, v2}
· v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} (# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2 · γ2 x')

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
W: category
Mon_W: monoidal W
F: W ⟶ V
U: fmonoidal Mon_W Mon_V F
v1, v2: V
γ1: relativelaxcommutator v1
γ2: relativelaxcommutator v2
x, x': W
f: W ⟦ x, x' ⟧
γ1_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v1 · γ1 x' =
γ1 x · v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
γ2_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2 · γ2 x' =
γ2 x · v2 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
(v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f) ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2
· α^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, F x', v2}
· v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} γ2 x' = ?b
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
W: category
Mon_W: monoidal W
F: W ⟶ V
U: fmonoidal Mon_W Mon_V F
v1, v2: V
γ1: relativelaxcommutator v1
γ2: relativelaxcommutator v2
x, x': W
f: W ⟦ x, x' ⟧
γ1_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v1 · γ1 x' =
γ1 x · v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
γ2_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2 · γ2 x' =
γ2 x · v2 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
?b =
α^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, F x, v2}
· v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} (# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2 · γ2 x')

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V

F: W ⟶ V
U: fmonoidal Mon_W Mon_V F
v1, v2: V

γ2: relativelaxcommutator v2
x, x': W
f: W ⟦ x, x' ⟧
γ1_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v1 · γ1 x' =
γ1 x · v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
γ2_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2 · γ2 x' =
γ2 x · v2 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
?b =
α^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, F x, v2}
· v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} (# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2 · γ2 x')
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
W: category
Mon_W: monoidal W
F: W ⟶ V
U: fmonoidal Mon_W Mon_V F
v1, v2: V
γ1: relativelaxcommutator v1
γ2: relativelaxcommutator v2
x, x': W
f: W ⟦ x, x' ⟧
γ1_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v1 · γ1 x' =
γ1 x · v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
γ2_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2 · γ2 x' =
γ2 x · v2 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
?t1 =
v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} (# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2 · γ2 x')

         apply pathsinv0, (functor_comp (leftwhiskering_functor Mon_V v1)). 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
W: category
Mon_W: monoidal W
F: W ⟶ V
U: fmonoidal Mon_W Mon_V F
v1, v2: V
γ1: relativelaxcommutator v1
γ2: relativelaxcommutator v2
x, x': W
f: W ⟦ x, x' ⟧
γ1_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v1 · γ1 x' =
γ1 x · v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
γ2_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2 · γ2 x' =
γ2 x · v2 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
(v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f) ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2
· α^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, F x', v2}
· v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} γ2 x' =
α^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, F x, v2}
· (# (leftwhiskering_functor Mon_V v1)
     (# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2)
   · # (leftwhiskering_functor Mon_V v1) (γ2 x'))

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
W: category
Mon_W: monoidal W
F: W ⟶ V
U: fmonoidal Mon_W Mon_V F
v1, v2: V
γ1: relativelaxcommutator v1
γ2: relativelaxcommutator v2
x, x': W
f: W ⟦ x, x' ⟧
γ1_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v1 · γ1 x' =
γ1 x · v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
γ2_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2 · γ2 x' =
γ2 x · v2 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
(v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f) ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2
· α^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, F x', v2}
· v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} γ2 x' =
α^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, F x, v2}
· (v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} (# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2)
   · v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} γ2 x')

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
W: category
Mon_W: monoidal W
F: W ⟶ V
U: fmonoidal Mon_W Mon_V F
v1, v2: V
γ1: relativelaxcommutator v1
γ2: relativelaxcommutator v2
x, x': W
f: W ⟦ x, x' ⟧
γ1_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v1 · γ1 x' =
γ1 x · v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
γ2_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2 · γ2 x' =
γ2 x · v2 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
(v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f) ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2
· α^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, F x', v2}
· v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} γ2 x' =
α^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, F x, v2}
· v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} (# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2)
· v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} γ2 x'

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
W: category
Mon_W: monoidal W
F: W ⟶ V
U: fmonoidal Mon_W Mon_V F
v1, v2: V
γ1: relativelaxcommutator v1
γ2: relativelaxcommutator v2
x, x': W
f: W ⟦ x, x' ⟧
γ1_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v1 · γ1 x' =
γ1 x · v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
γ2_nat: ∏ (x x' : W) (f : W ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2 · γ2 x' =
γ2 x · v2 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f
(v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} # F f) ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2
· α^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, F x', v2} =
α^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, F x, v2}
· v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} (# F f ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2)

    apply pathsinv0, monoidal_associatornatleftright.
  Qed.

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
W: category

v1, v2: V

  composedrelativelaxcommutator_data

  
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V

V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
W: category
Mon_W: monoidal W
F: W ⟶ V
U: fmonoidal Mon_W Mon_V F
v1, v2: V
γ1: relativelaxcommutator v1
γ2: relativelaxcommutator v2
w, w': W
αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ F (w ⊗_{ Mon_W} w'), v1, v2}
· γ1 (w ⊗_{ Mon_W} w') ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2
· α^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, F (w ⊗_{ Mon_W} w'), v2}
· v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} γ2 (w ⊗_{ Mon_W} w')
· αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, v2, F (w ⊗_{ Mon_W} w')} =
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly U w w')
⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} (v1 ⊗_{ Mon_V} v2)
· α^{ Mon_V }_{ F w, F w', v1 ⊗_{ Mon_V} v2}
· F w
  ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} (αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ F w', v1, v2}
                  · γ1 w' ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2
                  · α^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, F w', v2}
                  · v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} γ2 w'
                  · αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, v2, F w'})
· αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ F w, v1 ⊗_{ Mon_V} v2, F w'}
· (αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ F w, v1, v2}
   · γ1 w ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2
   · α^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, F w, v2}
   · v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} γ2 w
   · αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, v2, F w})
  ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} F w'
· α^{ Mon_V }_{ v1 ⊗_{ Mon_V} v2, F w, F w'}
· (v1 ⊗_{ Mon_V} v2)
  ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} fmonoidal_preservestensordata U w w'

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
W: category
Mon_W: monoidal W
F: W ⟶ V
U: fmonoidal Mon_W Mon_V F
v1, v2: V
γ1: relativelaxcommutator v1
γ2: relativelaxcommutator v2
w, w': W
αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ F (w ⊗_{ Mon_W} w'), v1, v2}
· (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly U w w')
   ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v1 · α^{ Mon_V }_{ F w, F w', v1}
   · F w ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} γ1 w'
   · αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ F w, v1, F w'}
   · γ1 w ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} F w'
   · α^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, F w, F w'}
   · v1
     ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} fmonoidal_preservestensordata U w
                      w') ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2
· α^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, F (w ⊗_{ Mon_W} w'), v2}
· v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} γ2 (w ⊗_{ Mon_W} w')
· αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, v2, F (w ⊗_{ Mon_W} w')} =
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly U w w')
⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} (v1 ⊗_{ Mon_V} v2)
· α^{ Mon_V }_{ F w, F w', v1 ⊗_{ Mon_V} v2}
· F w
  ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} (αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ F w', v1, v2}
                  · γ1 w' ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2
                  · α^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, F w', v2}
                  · v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} γ2 w'
                  · αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, v2, F w'})
· αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ F w, v1 ⊗_{ Mon_V} v2, F w'}
· (αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ F w, v1, v2}
   · γ1 w ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2
   · α^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, F w, v2}
   · v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} γ2 w
   · αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, v2, F w})
  ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} F w'
· α^{ Mon_V }_{ v1 ⊗_{ Mon_V} v2, F w, F w'}
· (v1 ⊗_{ Mon_V} v2)
  ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} fmonoidal_preservestensordata U w w'

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
W: category
Mon_W: monoidal W
F: W ⟶ V
U: fmonoidal Mon_W Mon_V F
v1, v2: V
γ1: relativelaxcommutator v1
γ2: relativelaxcommutator v2
w, w': W
αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ F (w ⊗_{ Mon_W} w'), v1, v2}
· (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly U w w')
   ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v1 · α^{ Mon_V }_{ F w, F w', v1}
   · F w ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} γ1 w'
   · αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ F w, v1, F w'}
   · γ1 w ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} F w'
   · α^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, F w, F w'}
   · v1
     ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} fmonoidal_preservestensordata U w
                      w') ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2
· α^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, F (w ⊗_{ Mon_W} w'), v2}
· v1
  ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} (pr1
                    (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                       U w w') ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2
                  · α^{ Mon_V }_{ F w, F w', v2}
                  · F w ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} γ2 w'
                  · αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ F w, v2, F w'}
                  · γ2 w ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} F w'
                  · α^{ Mon_V }_{ v2, F w, F w'}
                  · v2
                    ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                                     U w w')
· αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, v2, F (w ⊗_{ Mon_W} w')} =
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly U w w')
⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} (v1 ⊗_{ Mon_V} v2)
· α^{ Mon_V }_{ F w, F w', v1 ⊗_{ Mon_V} v2}
· F w
  ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} (αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ F w', v1, v2}
                  · γ1 w' ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2
                  · α^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, F w', v2}
                  · v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} γ2 w'
                  · αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, v2, F w'})
· αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ F w, v1 ⊗_{ Mon_V} v2, F w'}
· (αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ F w, v1, v2}
   · γ1 w ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2
   · α^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, F w, v2}
   · v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} γ2 w
   · αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, v2, F w})
  ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} F w'
· α^{ Mon_V }_{ v1 ⊗_{ Mon_V} v2, F w, F w'}
· (v1 ⊗_{ Mon_V} v2)
  ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} fmonoidal_preservestensordata U w w'

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
W: category
Mon_W: monoidal W
F: W ⟶ V
U: fmonoidal Mon_W Mon_V F
v1, v2: V
γ1: relativelaxcommutator v1
γ2: relativelaxcommutator v2
w, w': W
αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ F (w ⊗_{ Mon_W} w'), v1, v2}
· (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly U w w')
   ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v1 · α^{ Mon_V }_{ F w, F w', v1}
   · F w ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} γ1 w'
   · αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ F w, v1, F w'}
   · γ1 w ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} F w'
   · α^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, F w, F w'}
   · v1
     ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} fmonoidal_preservestensordata U w
                      w') ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2
· α^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, F (w ⊗_{ Mon_W} w'), v2}
· v1
  ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} (pr1
                    (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                       U w w') ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2
                  · α^{ Mon_V }_{ F w, F w', v2}
                  · F w ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} γ2 w'
                  · αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ F w, v2, F w'}
                  · γ2 w ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} F w'
                  · α^{ Mon_V }_{ v2, F w, F w'}
                  · v2
                    ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                                     U w w')
· αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, v2, F (w ⊗_{ Mon_W} w')} = 
?b
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
W: category
Mon_W: monoidal W
F: W ⟶ V
U: fmonoidal Mon_W Mon_V F
v1, v2: V
γ1: relativelaxcommutator v1
γ2: relativelaxcommutator v2
w, w': W
?b =
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly U w w')
⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} (v1 ⊗_{ Mon_V} v2)
· α^{ Mon_V }_{ F w, F w', v1 ⊗_{ Mon_V} v2}
· F w
  ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} (αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ F w', v1, v2}
                  · γ1 w' ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2
                  · α^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, F w', v2}
                  · v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} γ2 w'
                  · αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, v2, F w'})
· αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ F w, v1 ⊗_{ Mon_V} v2, F w'}
· (αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ F w, v1, v2}
   · γ1 w ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2
   · α^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, F w, v2}
   · v1 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} γ2 w
   · αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, v2, F w})
  ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} F w'
· α^{ Mon_V }_{ v1 ⊗_{ Mon_V} v2, F w, F w'}
· (v1 ⊗_{ Mon_V} v2)
  ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} fmonoidal_preservestensordata U w w'

    
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V
W: category
Mon_W: monoidal W
F: W ⟶ V

v1, v2: V

γ2: relativelaxcommutator v2
w, w': W
αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ F (w ⊗_{ Mon_W} w'), v1, v2}
· (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly U w w')
   ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v1 · α^{ Mon_V }_{ F w, F w', v1}
   · F w ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} γ1 w'
   · αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ F w, v1, F w'}
   · γ1 w ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} F w'
   · α^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, F w, F w'}
   · v1
     ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} fmonoidal_preservestensordata U w
                      w') ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2
· α^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, F (w ⊗_{ Mon_W} w'), v2}
· v1
  ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} (pr1
                    (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                       U w w') ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2
                  · α^{ Mon_V }_{ F w, F w', v2}
                  · F w ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} γ2 w'
                  · αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ F w, v2, F w'}
                  · γ2 w ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} F w'
                  · α^{ Mon_V }_{ v2, F w, F w'}
                  · v2
                    ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                                     U w w')
· αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, v2, F (w ⊗_{ Mon_W} w')} = 
?b
 
V: category
Mon_V: monoidal V

γ2: relativelaxcommutator v2
w, w': W
αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ F (w ⊗_{ Mon_W} w'), v1, v2}
· (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly U w w')
   ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v1 · α^{ Mon_V }_{ F w, F w', v1}
   · F w ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} γ1 w'
   · αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ F w, v1, F w'}
   · γ1 w ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} F w'
   · α^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, F w, F w'}
   · v1
     ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} fmonoidal_preservestensordata U w
                      w') ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2 = ?f'

(pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly U w w')
 ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v1 · α^{ Mon_V }_{ F w, F w', v1}
 · F w ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} γ1 w'
 · αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ F w, v1, F w'}
 · γ1 w ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} F w'
 · α^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, F w, F w'}
 · v1
   ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} fmonoidal_preservestensordata U w w')
⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} v2 = ?t2

 · F w ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{l} γ1 w'
 · αinv^{ Mon_V }_{ F w, v1, F w'}
 · γ1 w ⊗^{ Mon_V}_{r} F w'
 · α^{ Mon_V }_{ v1, F w, F w'}
 · v1
